## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss RAMP's SEO challenges and explore potential solutions using GrowthX's AI-powered content generation capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RAMP experienced a 50-70% drop in click-through rates due to Google's AI overviews rollout](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [GrowthX has developed advanced AI workflows for content generation, research, and app development](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [RAMP and GrowthX will collaborate on building affiliate sites to improve SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [GrowthX is launching a content OS platform in a month, integrating site mapping and workflow executions](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### RAMP's SEO Challenges

  - [Google's AI overviews rollout caused a 50-70% drop in click-through rates for RAMP's top 50 placements](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [RAMP is behind on AEO (assumed to be App Store Optimization) but improving](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Competitor Brax is outperforming RAMP on citations (3.5% vs 2.4%)](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [RAMP shifted focus from mass production to targeted, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### GrowthX's AI Capabilities

  - [Developed a coding agent that builds workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Can process millions of tokens for a single piece of content ($20-$30 worth of compute)](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Created a prompt generator for complex app development tasks](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Building a starter kit library with fully functioning apps](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Assembling a team of AI-native design engineers and researchers](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### Affiliate Site Strategy

  - [RAMP considering building or acquiring affiliate sites to improve SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [GrowthX offered to help build affiliate sites using their AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Discussed potential for a 3-month pilot project focused on affiliate site development](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide a spec proposal and research for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

### Content Generation and Research

  - [GrowthX's workflows can generate structured data and answer specific research questions](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Utilizes multiple APIs (e.g., Perplexity) and custom filtering for high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Building custom workflows to feed content into various projects (e.g., CodeLibrary.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Upcoming GrowthX Platform

  - [Launching a content OS platform in about a month](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Will integrate site mapping, workflow executions, and automate Airtable processes](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [Partnership with Scrunch.ai for improved data access and monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Luke to send GrowthX details on target affiliate areas for research](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare a spec proposal and conduct research on affiliate site opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting next week to review findings and discuss potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
  - [GrowthX to include George in the next meeting for broader team involvement](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of creating synthetic finance personas for improved content personalization](https://fathom.video/share/xhYm9jXeevrPYdxUkWEuNgtMz6CyYRqx?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
